tables.name: Customers

measures.name: Sales Year Over Year Growth
measures.expression: DIVIDE([Total Sales] - [Previous Year Sales], [Previous Year Sales])

measures.name: Latest Year Sales
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    SUM(Sales[Sales Amount]),
    Sales[Year] = CALCULATE(MAX(Sales[Year]), ALL(Sales))
)

measures.name: Latest Month Sales
measures.expression:
VAR _LatestDate = CALCULATE(MAX(Sales[Order Date]), REMOVEFILTERS(Sales))
VAR _LatestYear = YEAR(_LatestDate)
VAR _LatestMonth = MONTH(_LatestDate)
RETURN
    CALCULATE(
        [Total Sales],
        KEEPFILTERS(Sales[Year] = _LatestYear),
        KEEPFILTERS(Sales[Month] = _LatestMonth)
    )

tables.name: Products
Sales
tables.source_query_m:
let
    Source = Table.FromRows(
        {
            {"1", "2025-01-10", "C1", "P1", "1", "North", "1200", "3", "200"},
            {"2", "2025-01-15", "C2", "P2", "2", "South", "800", "2", "150"},
            {"3", "2025-02-01", "C1", "P3", "3", "East", "1500", "5", "300"},
            {"4", "2025-02-10", "C3", "P1", "1", "West", "600", "1", "100"},
            {"5", "2024-01-15", "C1", "P1", "4", "North", "400", "2", "50"},
            {"6", "2024-04-03", "C2", "P2", "2", "West", "350", "1", "25"},
            {"7", "2024-02-11", "C4", "P3", "1", "East", "1000", "4", "500"}
        },
        type table [OrderID = text, RawDate = text, CustomerID = text, ProductID = text, ChannelID = text, Region = text, SalesAmount = text, Quantity = text, Margin = text]
    ),
    RenamedDateColumn = Table.RenameColumns(Source, {{"RawDate", "OrderDate"}}),
    ParsedDate = Table.TransformColumnTypes(RenamedDateColumn, {{"OrderDate", type date}}),
    AddedYear = Table.AddColumn(ParsedDate, "Year", each Date.Year([OrderDate]), Int64.Type),
    AddedMonth = Table.AddColumn(AddedYear, "Month", each Date.Month([OrderDate]), Int64.Type),
    RenamedColumns = Table.RenameColumns(AddedMonth, {
        {"OrderID", "Order ID"},
        {"OrderDate", "Order Date"},
        {"CustomerID", "Customer ID"},
        {"ProductID", "Product ID"},
        {"ChannelID", "Channel ID"},
        {"SalesAmount", "Sales Amount"}
    }),
    SelectedColumns = Table.SelectColumns(RenamedColumns, {"Order ID", "Order Date", "Year", "Month", "Customer ID", "Product ID", "Channel ID", "Region", "Sales Amount", "Quantity", "Margin"}),
    Output = Table.TransformColumnTypes(SelectedColumns, {
        {"Order ID", Int64.Type},
        {"Order Date", type datetime},
        {"Year", Int64.Type},
        {"Month", Int64.Type},
        {"Customer ID", type text},
        {"Product ID", type text},
        {"Channel ID", Int64.Type},
        {"Region", type text},
        {"Sales Amount", type number},
        {"Quantity", Int64.Type},
        {"Margin", type number}
    })
in
    Output

tables.name: SalesChannels
tables.source_query_m:
let
    // TODO: update file path to the actual location of Channels.csv
    Source = Csv.Document(File.Contents("C:\data\Channels.csv"), [Delimiter=",", Columns=null, Encoding=1252, QuoteStyle=QuoteStyle.None]),
    Output = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true])
in
    Output

columns.name: Sales by Product Dimension Selector Fields
Sales by Product Dimension Selector Order
